  • May 25, 2026 lab-notesai-ethicsmagnifica-humanitas

    Cantiere Neemia: an operational tool for ethical discernment of AI projects

    Lab notes on a skill built to pair the technical review of AI projects with a structured ethical verification, inspired by Pope Leo XIV's encyclical Magnifica Humanitas. Three applied cases: where the skill confirms, corrects, and where it recommends redesign.
